Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
